description: Fakerson, Madeup & Totallyriel LLP (doing business as FMT LLP) is a mid-size, PCAOB-registered public accounting firm headquartered in Fictionville, California. The firm specializes in audit and advisory services for technology companies, with additional expertise in cybersecurity compliance, privacy audits, and SOC reporting.
service_lines: Financial Statement Audits (public and private companies)
